seoTitle: Howards Grass vs Howell — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Howards Grass and Howell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Howards Grass vs Howell: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Howards Grass and Howell.
heading: Howards Grass vs Howell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Howards Grass, New South Wales and Howell, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Howell has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Howards Grass (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Howards Grass or Howell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Howards Grass has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Howell scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Howards Grass scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Howell scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Howards Grass or Howell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Howell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
